UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user interacting with the application, allowing them to provide feedback, ratings, and votes while maintaining privacy by not storing authentication details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

displayName.description: The public display name or username chosen by the user.

stateId.description: Reference to the State where the user is registered or primarily located. (Relationship: State 1:N UserProfile)

city.description: The city where the user is primarily located.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

SchemeApplication.title: SchemeApplication
SchemeApplication.description: Represents a citizen's application for a specific government scheme, tracked in their personal vault.

State.title: State
State.description: Represents an Indian state or union territory, used for categorizing state-specific schemes, user location, and visualizing regional development progress on an interactive map.

id.description: Unique identifier for the State entity (e.g., ISO 3166-2 code or a custom ID).

name.description: The official name of the state or union territory (e.g., 'Uttar Pradesh', 'Maharashtra').

overallDevelopmentPercentage.description: The current calculated overall development percentage for this state, used for color-coding on the interactive map.

description.description: A brief description or additional details about the state's profile or development focus.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a classification for government schemes, enabling users to browse and filter schemes by type or sector (e.g., Agriculture, Education, Health).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

name.description: The name of the category (e.g., 'Kisan Yojana', 'Mahila Yojana', 'Shiksha').

description.description: A brief explanation of what this category of schemes covers.

iconName.description: A string identifier for an icon associated with this category, used for visual representation in the UI.

Scheme.title: Scheme
Scheme.description: Represents a central or state government scheme, detailing its purpose, progress, and aggregated public engagement metrics.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Scheme entity.

name.description: The official, commonly known name of the government scheme.

description.description: A detailed explanation of the scheme's objectives, benefits, and eligibility criteria.

type.description: The type of government body responsible for the scheme ('Central' or 'State').

ministry.description: The specific government ministry or department responsible for implementing the scheme.

stateId.description: Reference to the State if this is a state-specific scheme. This field will be null for central schemes. (Relationship: State 1:N Scheme)

targetAudience.description: A description of the primary beneficiaries or demographic targeted by the scheme (e.g., 'Farmers', 'Women', 'Youth', 'Rural Households').

targetCompletionYear.description: The target year for the completion or full implementation of the scheme.

currentProgressPercentage.description: The current calculated percentage of completion or implementation progress for the scheme.

detailsUrl.description: A URL linking to a more detailed official page, document, or portal about the scheme.

categoryIds.description: References to Categories this scheme belongs to, allowing multi-category classification. (Relationship: Category N:N Scheme)

totalUpvotes.description: Aggregated count of positive votes (upvotes) received for this scheme from users.

totalDownvotes.description: Aggregated count of negative votes (downvotes) received for this scheme from users.

averageRating.description: The calculated average 5-star rating for the scheme, derived from user ratings.

publishedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the scheme details were first published or made available in the application.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the scheme's core details were updated.

SchemeRating.title: SchemeRating
SchemeRating.description: Records an individual user's 5-star rating for a specific government scheme, contributing to the scheme's overall average rating.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SchemeRating entity.

schemeId.description: Reference to the Scheme that was rated. (Relationship: Scheme 1:N SchemeRating)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who submitted the rating. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N SchemeRating)

rating.description: The rating value given by the user, on a scale of 1 to 5 stars.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the rating was submitted.

SchemeVote.title: SchemeVote
SchemeVote.description: Records an individual user's upvote or downvote for a specific government scheme, used for trending and popularity metrics.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SchemeVote entity.

schemeId.description: Reference to the Scheme that received the vote. (Relationship: Scheme 1:N SchemeVote)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who submitted the vote. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N SchemeVote)

voteType.description: The type of vote submitted ('upvote' or 'downvote').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the vote was submitted.

SchemeFeedback.title: SchemeFeedback
SchemeFeedback.description: Captures textual feedback or comments provided by a user for a specific government scheme, allowing citizens to express their views.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SchemeFeedback entity.

schemeId.description: Reference to the Scheme to which the feedback pertains. (Relationship: Scheme 1:N SchemeFeedback)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who submitted the feedback. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N SchemeFeedback)

comment.description: The textual content of the feedback or comment provided by the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the feedback was submitted.

isApproved.description: Indicates whether the feedback has been reviewed and approved by a moderator for public display.

PublicIdea.title: PublicIdea
PublicIdea.description: Stores new ideas or suggestions submitted by users for consideration in government initiatives, fostering public participation in policy-making.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PublicIdea entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who submitted the idea. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N PublicIdea)

title.description: The concise title or main subject of the submitted idea.

description.description: A detailed explanation of the proposed idea, its rationale, and potential impact.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the idea was submitted.

isApproved.description: Indicates whether the idea has been reviewed and approved by a moderator for public visibility or government consideration.

Poll.title: Poll
Poll.description: Represents a public opinion poll, typically featured as a 'Poll of the Day', to gather citizen's views on current topics.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Poll entity.

question.description: The main question posed in the poll to the public.

description.description: An optional longer description or context providing background for the poll question.

status.description: The current lifecycle status of the poll (e.g., 'active', 'closed', 'draft').

publishedAt.description: Timestamp when the poll was made active and visible for public voting.

closedAt.description: Timestamp when the poll was closed and no longer accepting votes.

PollOption.title: PollOption
PollOption.description: Represents a single answer option available for a specific public opinion poll.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PollOption entity.

pollId.description: Reference to the Poll this option belongs to. (Relationship: Poll 1:N PollOption)

text.description: The textual content of the poll option (e.g., 'हाँ, बिल्कुल', 'नहीं', 'पता नहीं').

displayOrder.description: A numerical value determining the display order of this option relative to other options for the same poll.

totalVotes.description: Aggregated count of votes received for this specific poll option.

PollVote.title: PollVote
PollVote.description: Records an individual user's vote for a specific option within a poll, ensuring unique votes per user per poll.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PollVote entity.

pollOptionId.description: Reference to the PollOption that was voted for. (Relationship: PollOption 1:N PollVote)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who cast the vote. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N PollVote)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the vote was cast.

NationalProgressSnapshot.title: NationalProgressSnapshot
NationalProgressSnapshot.description: Stores historical snapshots of the overall national development progress by year, providing data for the 'Vikas Gati Tracker' and year-wise comparisons.

id.description: Unique identifier for the NationalProgressSnapshot entity.

year.description: The calendar year for which this national progress snapshot is recorded (e.g., 2020, 2021).

overallDevelopmentPercentage.description: The calculated overall national development percentage for that specific year.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this snapshot record was created or last updated.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: stateId
params.description: The unique identifier for the State.

params.name: schemeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Scheme.

params.name: schemeFeedbackId
params.description: The unique identifier for the feedback.

firestore.reasoning: The structure uses path-based ownership for user data and top-level collections for shared/public data.
